name: Ukrainian Honey-Onion Sauce <Lukovey Vzhar>
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sunflower oil in a large cast iron skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and onions to the skillet. Stir frequently and cook for 20 minutes, or until the onions are soft and translucent.
3. Add the beef stock and increase the heat to high. Cook for approximately 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid is reduced by about half.
4. Stir in the Dijon mustard, honey, and cider vinegar. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let the sauce sit undisturbed for another 10-15 minutes.
6. Serve warm but not hot. Note: This traditional sauce pairs well with various dishes. It complements vegetables, enhances meats, and can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 7 days or frozen for up to 4 months.
